item.dc:creator: RECYCLEDMEMES

item.title: I've been MIA for a week. Have a shitpost.
item.description:
This one is as loud as it is awesome.
This is the kind of shirt that can get you murdered in some jobs.
They struck oil... Eventually.
Old school.
Pops is hella proud.
He stole her soap and swapped it with a potato.
Nerd shit from here on out.
All hail Sasquatch
Please do not feed the Sasquatch.
item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: It doesn't take much to entertain us
item.dc:creator: Igotfourbedrats

item.title: What Happened Today #83
item.description: Trump went full-on rich guy trying to control the economy today. He said millionaires would flee the country if taxed more, then turned around and attacked the World Bank, IMF, and Federal Reserve—all while his personal crypto spiked 58% after he promised a private dinner for the 200 biggest holders. Trump always makes sure he gets a cut. But somehow, this country decided it’s fine for a sitting president to sell shares of his own currency to people with cash to burn. Please contact your senators and representatives to tell them that they have to stop him. Don’t trust the algorithm. Get this in your inbox every night, free and private, so you never miss what’s really going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/tesla-profit 2. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c78jx68d922o 3. https://go.govbrief.today/order-accreditation 4. https://go.govbrief.today/eeoc-columbia-barnard 5. https://go.govbrief.today/education-orders 6. https://go.govbrief.today/va-christian 7. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-signal-pentagon 8. https://go.govbrief.today/gov-appeal-ozturk 9. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-powell-again 10. https://go.govbrief.today/kilmar-extension 11. https://go.govbrief.today/memecoin-dinner 12. https://go.govbrief.today/mccoy-portraits 13. https://go.govbrief.today/12states-tariffs 14. https://go.govbrief.today/law-firms-permanent 15. https://go.govbrief.today/imf-worldbank 16. https://go.govbrief.today/millionaires-will-leave 17. https://go.govbrief.today/wh-flagpoles 18. https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-makeuproom 19. https://go.govbrief.today/200-schools-letter

item.title: Ukraine absolutely can fight
item.description: 1427 km2 in two years. That's 2 km2 per day that Ukraine lost in the last 2 years. Let's give Ukrainians what they need.

item.title: After this collision, this car shows where it has been held together by glue. Nothing welded or engineered to safely fold on impact.
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: Luna Snow - DJ Cosplay
item.description:
Luna Snow from Marvel Rivals DJ mixing to Ice Ice Baby... I need a pun to name this remix... Toss suggestions if you got em! Also, thank you all for letting me indulge in my new hobby. Has been such a blast, and has been such a fun new way to show off my cosplays that isn't just me in a mirror :P Also, I had to do some cuts in this mix, I only got 60 seconds. I always post giant full version of my mixes on my other sites... along with... other things... just putting that out there.
Reference Character
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: It's just swords
item.description: @swordscomic I had a friend share this meme and immediately googled Sword Bra Swords comic and was surprised nothing from you came up. Has there really never been a Sword Bra?
